summary: Iteration 71: Landing Page + Auth Flow Testing - ALL 15 SCENARIOS PASSED. Landing page pixel-perfect with 12 sections (Navbar, Hero typewriter, Problem, Solution, How It Works, AI, Benefits, Modules, Pricing, FAQ, Contact Form, Footer). Login/Signup pages use shared AuthHeader (back arrow + spet. logo + theme toggle). Critical bug fix VERIFIED: teste1@teste.com now redirects to /onboarding (NOT stuck on login). All logout flows redirect to /login on same domain.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All landing page sections verified. AuthHeader component (back arrow + spet. logo + theme toggle) used across LoginPage, SignupPage, OnboardingPage. Critical bug fix VERIFIED: teste1@teste.com redirects to /onboarding. Key data-testids: landing-page, navbar, hero, hero-cta-primary, nav-login, nav-signup, theme-toggle, pricing-cta-{core|flow|sync|os}, login-page, signup-page, onboarding-page, back-button, email-input, password-input, login-button, signup-submit-btn, logout-btn, plan-option-{id}.

Scenario 1: Landing Page Renders.details: Landing page at / renders with data-testid='landing-page', navbar, hero with typewriter animation, nav-login, nav-signup, theme-toggle, hero-cta-primary

Scenario 2: Nav Login → /login.details: Click 'Log in' in navbar navigates to /login

Scenario 3: Nav Signup → /signup.details: Click 'Start Now' in navbar navigates to /signup

Scenario 4: Pricing Section (4 cards).details: Scroll to #pricing shows 4 pricing cards: Core $49, Flow $89, Sync $149, OS $299. All have data-testid='pricing-cta-{id}'

Scenario 5: Theme Toggle.details: Theme toggle switches between dark (rgb(3,4,7)) and light (rgb(245,247,249)) mode

Scenario 6: Login Page with AuthHeader.details: Login page has AuthHeader (back-button, spet. logo, theme-toggle), email/password inputs, premium login button

Scenario 7: Signup Page with AuthHeader.details: Signup page has AuthHeader, name/email/password inputs, 4 plan options (plan-option-core/flow/sync/os), 'Get started' button

Scenario 9: Login teste1@teste.com → /on.details: BUG FIX VERIFIED: Non-onboarded user now correctly redirects to /onboarding (NOT stuck on login). OnboardingPage shows AuthHeader with back button.

Scenario 10: Login CEO → /ceo.details: CEO user garcia.rapha2@gmail.com correctly redirects to /ceo Executive Overview dashboard

Scenario 11: Logout /venue/home → /login.details: Logout from /venue/home redirects to /login on same Emergent domain (not external)

Scenario 12: Logout /ceo → /login (same.details: Logout from /ceo redirects to /login on same Emergent domain

Scenario 13: Signup 'Sign in' link → /lo.details: Click 'Sign in' link on signup page navigates to /login

Scenario 14: Login 'Get started' link →.details: Click 'Get started' link on login page navigates to /signup

Scenario 15: Signup Back Button → /login.details: AuthHeader back button on signup page navigates to /login (as configured with backTo='/login')

landing_page_sections_verified: Navbar (sticky, logo, nav links, Log in, Start Now, theme toggle)
